Healthy Smiles in Scottsdale

Summit Dentist provides expert dental care tailored to the Phoenix metro area. Our gentle approach ensures comfortable treatments for every patient.

Call Now: 555-den-r91

Your Trusted Scottsdale Dentist

Founded in 2012, Summit Dentist has been serving the Scottsdale community with personalized dental care. Our practice was built on the belief that everyone deserves a healthy, confident smile.

Our Dentist Services

Professional dentist solutions tailored to your needs.

Preventive Care

Comprehensive exams and cleanings to maintain optimal oral health.

Learn More →

Cosmetic Dentistry

Enhance your smile with customized aesthetic treatments.

Learn More →

Restorative Dentistry

Repair damaged teeth with durable, functional solutions.

Learn More →

Periodontal Care

Specialized treatment for gum disease and oral inflammation.

Learn More →

Emergency Dentistry

Prompt care for dental trauma and sudden pain.

Learn More →

Pediatric Dentistry

Gentle dental care for Scottsdale's youngest patients.

Learn More →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our dentist services.

How often should I get a dental cleaning in Arizona's dry climate?

We recommend cleanings every 6 months, though some patients benefit from 3-4 month intervals if they experience dry mouth or rapid tartar buildup.

Do you offer early morning or late evening appointments?

Yes, we accommodate Scottsdale professionals with flexible scheduling, including appointments as early as 7 AM.

What makes your cleanings different from other practices?

We use specialized hydration protocols to protect sensitive tissues in our arid climate, and our hygienists receive advanced training in dry mouth management.

Reviews From Our Dentist Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"After years of hiding my smile at Scottsdale social events, Dr. Chen transformed my teeth with veneers that look incredibly natural, even in our bright Arizona sunlight. The entire team made me feel comfortable throughout the process."

Meredith T. Cosmetic Dentistry

"When I cracked a tooth during a golf game at TPC Scottsdale, Summit Dentist got me in immediately. They fixed the damage perfectly and even arranged follow-up care around my work schedule in Old Town."

Raj P. Emergency Dentistry

"My daughter used to dread dental visits until we found Summit Dentist. Now she actually looks forward to her cleanings! The hygienist taught her special techniques for our dry climate that have greatly improved her oral health."

Sophia L. Pediatric Dentistry
